zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis De Baux於1330年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯德維爾時，他的父親Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux35歲，母親Marguerite d'Aulnay31歲。他於1350年與Luisa Sanseverino結婚。他去世於1422年4月23日之後在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞，埋葬在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞桑也阿格斯迪諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis De Baux于1330年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯德維爾时，他的父亲Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux35岁，母亲Marguerite d'Aulnay31岁。他于1350年与Luisa Sanseverino结婚。他去世于1422年4月23日之后在意大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞，埋葬在意大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞桑也阿格斯迪諾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hauck
meanings: German: from a dialect variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Hugo (see Hugh ). Compare Haug .

variants.name: Houx
meanings: French (northern) and Walloon: topographic name from French houx ‘holly’, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, for example in Eure-et-Loir (France) and in the province of Namur in Belgium (Wallonia).
German: rare northern variant of   Haux   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis De Baux was born in 1330, in Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux, was 35 and his mother, Marguerite d'Aulnay, was 31. He married Luisa Sanseverino in 1350. He died after 23 April 1422, in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy, and was buried in Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis De Baux est né en 1330, à Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Aulnay, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Luisa Sanseverino en 1350. Il est décédé après 23 avril 1422, à Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie, et a été enterré à Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis De Baux 1330 in Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux 35 und seine Mutter Marguerite d'Aulnay 31. Er hat 1350 Luisa Sanseverino geheiratet. Er starb nach 23. April 1422 in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien und wurde in Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis De Baux è nato il nel 1330 nel Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite d'Aulnay, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Luisa Sanseverino nel 1350. Morì dopo il 23 aprile 1422, nel Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, e fu sepolto a Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.

ja.Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fr: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスデヴィル
ja.lifeSummary: Francis De Bauxが1330年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスデヴィルで生まれた時，父Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Bauxは35歳，母Marguerite d'Aulnayは31歳であった。1350年にLuisa Sanseverinoと結婚した。彼は1422年4月23日以後にイタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアで死去し，イタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアサント'アゴスティノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis De Baux(이)가 1330년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 데빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite d'Aulnay(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1350년 Luisa Sanseverino(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1422년 4월 23일 이후 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아에서 사망했으며 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아 산트'아고스틴오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis De Baux nasceu em 1330, em Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Aulnay, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Luisa Sanseverino em 1350. Ele faleceu após 23 de abril de 1422, em Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália, e foi sepultado em Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis De Baux родился в 1330 г. в местности девилл, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Aulnay, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Luisa Sanseverino в 1350 г. Он умер после 23 апрель 1422 г. в местности андря, бари, пугля, Италия и был похоронен в местности сант'агостино, андря, бари, пугля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis De Baux nació en 1330, en Deville, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Conte di Andria e di Montescaglioso Bertrand III des Baux, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Aulnay, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Luisa Sanseverino en 1350. Murió después de 23 de abril de 1422, en Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia, y fue sepultado en Sant'Agostino, Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.
